titles.title: Memory-induced thermal breathing of a granular force network: DEM source data and raw contact-network outputs

descriptions.description: Code and processed-data repository supporting a Nature Physics Article candidate on memory-induced thermal breathing in a thermally cycled granular force network. The public DOI snapshot includes processed source data, analysis scripts, selected figure outputs and raw-file checksum metadata. The full raw DEM dump, restart and contact-local pair-force files comprise 2823 files (5.01 GB locally) and should be deposited separately if full raw-output reanalysis is required.

rightsList.rights: Licence to be selected by the author and institution
